summary: Complete frontend testing of Learning Library page (MasterClass-style). All 10 features tested and verified working correctly. Pure black background, custom top navigation, 11 category tiles with icons, 3-column course grid, filter sidebar with accordions, card hover overlay with play/add buttons, search functionality, and play button navigation all working.

details: Background color: rgb(0, 0, 0) - pure black confirmed
Cinematic vignette effect present (rgba(80, 0, 0, 0.25) inset shadow)
Search bar: 'Search Instructors, Classes, Topics and more'
Nav links: My Progress, Library, Class TA
BETA badge visible on Class TA
User avatar with name and chevron dropdown
Active state styling applied correctly (purple border)
Accordion expands on click showing options
Format options: Class, Series, Session, Note
Add button (white circle with plus icon)
Search by title: 'Newport' -> 1 card (Cal Newport's course)

typography.status: PASSED - Google Inter font loaded correctly

design_review.contrast: PASSED - White text on black background provides excellent readability

seed_data_creation: No new data created - all 12 courses are hardcoded in PortalLibrary.jsx
context_for_next_testing_agent: Learning Library page is complete and fully functional. All 12 courses displayed in 3-column grid. All data is hardcoded (no API calls). Features include: category filtering, search by title/instructor/category, filter sidebar with accordions, course card hover overlay with play/add buttons. Play button navigates to Watch page. Inter font from Google Fonts is used. Portal header and bottom nav are hidden on Library page (has its own custom nav).

mocked_apis_note.note: All Library page data is hardcoded in the frontend component - no APIs used
